title: notifications-mail — subscribed events
description: Subscribes to core NotificationDispatched (channel=mail) + webhook::InboundWebhookReceived (namespace=notifications-mail) for provider callback ingestion + own bounce/complaint events for suppression + preference unsubscribes for cross-channel suppression sync.

listeners.purpose: Dispatches SendMailJob. Filter ensures we don't fire for non-mail channels.
Dispatches IngestMailProviderWebhookJob. Filter scopes to this module's provider callbacks. Provider (mailgun/sendgrid/aws-ses/postmark/resend) determined via event.provider.
Adds hard-bounced address to MailSuppression. Soft bounces retried instead.
Adds complained-about address to MailSuppression with reason=complaint. Retained P5Y for CAN-SPAM evidence.

listeners.filter: event.channel === 'mail' AND event.enabled === false AND event.source === 'unsubscribe_link'
listeners.purpose: When a user unsubscribes via a mail footer link, add their email to MailSuppression with reason=unsubscribed. Ensures the address is filtered at provider level too, not just at preference level.
Synchronous cache invalidation — next send attempt sees the fresh suppression state.
